title: facility — authorization policies
description: Four policies, one per owned model. Each policy composes the ResolveScope middleware's decision: a caller with scope 'branch:X' can only see/act on facilities inside branch X. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the permission check, then layers scope narrowing.

abilities.scope: any tenant member with facilities entitlement
narrows to caller's active branch scope when set
branch_manager narrowed to their scoped branches
same as create
admin + owner only
admin + owner only — financial-audit-critical
member: own bookings only (WHERE booked_by_user_id = auth()->id() OR booked_for_user_id = auth()->id()); coach: own + team bookings; branch_manager+: everything in scoped branches
member: same as viewAny; admins: bookings.view-all
member: booked_for_user_id must equal auth()->id() (bookings.create.for-other required to book on behalf of another user)
must be the booker OR an admin with bookings.cancel-any; observer additionally enforces cancellation_notice_hours unless bookings.cancel-any is held
must be the booker OR admin; reschedule triggers full overlap/availability/capacity re-check
reserved for Wave 4 refund flow; manual completion refused by observer
audit-critical: every fire notifies the tenant admin and writes an audit row with retention 7 years
reception + branch_manager + admin see day_passes for their scoped branch(es); a user can see their own past passes via a separate my-passes endpoint
issuer + issued_to_user (if named) + reception in same branch
requires facilities_advanced entitlement (Enterprise-only)
must be within 30-day refund window per observer
member: own passes only (WHERE auth()->id() IN assignable_user_ids); coaches see passes assigned to their coached athletes; branch_manager+: all in scoped branches
requires facilities_advanced entitlement
refused when pass.is_transferable=false
admin + owner only; revocation is audit-critical
